Question 2: Description. Does the text briefly describe contents of each section? So yes, it describes. Complies: true. Feedback: highlight that it gives brief description.

Question 3: Structure. Can it be easily understood what is the general structure of the thesis just from this text? It lists six sections in order, each with description. So yes, structure is clear. Complies: true.

Thus all three true. Provide feedback accordingly.
